title: ChannelManagement Output
description: Structured output from channel-management skill execution

ok.description: True if the action completed without error

running.description: Whether the channel session is currently running

pid.description: PID of the running channel session, or null if not running

health.description: Health status of the channel session after the action

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of the result (e.g. 'already-running', 'started', 'TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not set')

trackerEntry.description: The matching entry from terminal-pids.json for this session, or null

sessions.description: All tracked channel sessions (populated for status action)

checkedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the health check was performed

error.description: Error message if ok is false
